subject: Book for the 14th?
snippet: Bar Central for the 14th, my treat since I always steal your fries.
body:
Was thinking Bar Central for the 14th, quiet corner table.
My treat since I always steal your fries. Confirm and I book.

subject: Re: Book for the 14th?
snippet: Booked 19:30, two people, corner. Your fries are safe.
body:
Booked 19:30, two people, corner. Your fries are safe from me
for exactly one course.

subject: Tantolunden loop 06:30
snippet: Cold snap coming. Layers. I bring thermos, you bring pace.
body:
Cold snap coming through. Layers on. I bring the thermos,
you bring the pace. Meet at the usual bench.

subject: Re: Tantolunden loop 06:30
snippet: Copy. Thermos accepted. Do not expect conversation before km three.
body:
Copy. Thermos accepted. Do not expect conversation before
kilometre three.

subject: Sunday call?
snippet: Dad wants to walk you through the boiler quote before he signs.
body:
Dad wants to walk you through the boiler quote before he signs
anything. He is grumpy about it, so please humour him.

subject: Re: Sunday call?
snippet: I will be at the desk at 18:00 sharp. Ask him to send the PDF.
body:
I will be at the desk at 18:00 sharp. Ask him to send the PDF
beforehand so I can read it once without him hovering.

subject: Elsa asks when Uncle Carl visits
snippet: She drew you a picture of a running person. I attach photo separately.
body:
Elsa drew you a picture of a running person and has assigned it
to your fridge. Tell me a date that works before December.

subject: Re: Elsa asks when Uncle Carl visits
snippet: Aiming for the weekend of December 5. Will confirm by mid November.
body:
Aiming for the weekend of December 5. Will confirm by mid November
once work calms down.

subject: Package for you at my door
snippet: Delivery left running shoes by mistake. Come by when convenient.
body:
Delivery driver dropped your running shoes at my flat by mistake.
Come by when convenient, no rush.

subject: Re: Package for you at my door
snippet: Thanks. I will swing by after the run.
body: Thanks. I will swing by after the run.

subject: Q3 grantee spotlight
snippet: Feature on grantee programmes across Norrland.
body:
Featured programmes and grantee stories from across Norrland.
You are receiving this because you subscribed on the public site.

subject: Reservation confirmation Bar Central
snippet: Two guests, 19:30 on the 14th. Booking reference BC-88214.
body:
Two guests, 19:30 on the 14th of November. Booking reference
BC-88214. Cancellation window is 24 hours.

subject: Weekly running summary
body:
Four sessions, 38.2 km total, average pace 5:12 min per km.
Longest session Sunday, 14.6 km.

subject: Building notice window inspection October 28
snippet: Inspector visits between 09 and 12. Access to each flat required.
body:
Inspector visits every flat between 09 and 12 on the 28th of
October. Please leave keys with the janitor if you are away.

subject: Your listening rewind is ready
snippet: Top artist, top track and total minutes for the quarter.
body:
Your listening rewind is ready. Top artist, top track and
total minutes for the quarter.
